svg.aria-label: FIRESTARTER backdoor survives patches on federal Cisco Firepower appliances; NASA employees duped by Chinese spear-phishing targeting US defense software; AWS post-quantum cryptography migration to resist harvest-now-decrypt-later attacks
svg.title: 2026-04-25: FIRESTARTER backdoor (Cisco Firepower), NASA spear-phishing (China APT), Post-quantum crypto migration (AWS PQC)

g.text: CISA and NCSC advisory : remote access backdoor : firmware-level persistence : patch alone insufficient
NASA OIG report : fake US researcher identity : ITAR and EAR violations : developer CI/CD accounts at risk
HNDL attack : harvest now decrypt later
AWS PQC migration : ECDHE and RSA replaced : NIST ML-KEM and ML-DSA : Secrets Manager upgrade required
